character.li_yan.name: Li Yan
character.su_qing.name: Su Qing
character.bai_zhi.name: Bai Zhi
character.ling_er.name: Ling Er
skill.sword_qi.name: Sword Qi Slash
skill.sword_qi.desc: Melee: a slash of condensed sword qi strikes an adjacent foe.
skill.palm_wave.name: Cloud-Parting Palm
skill.palm_wave.desc: A palm strike of inner force hurls an adjacent foe back 2 tiles.
skill.flying_sword.name: Flying Sword
skill.flying_sword.desc: Ranged: command a flying sword in a straight line, up to 3 tiles.
skill.qi_shield.name: Guardian Qi
skill.qi_shield.desc: Circulate inner qi into a barrier that blocks the next hit.
skill.ghost_claw.name: Ghost Claw
skill.ghost_claw.desc: Melee: spectral claws rake an adjacent target.
skill.corpse_smash.name: Corpse Smash
skill.corpse_smash.desc: Melee: a crushing blow that also shoves the target back.
skill.spirit_bolt.name: Spirit Bolt
skill.spirit_bolt.desc: Ranged: a bolt of resentful qi fired from afar, up to 3 tiles.
skill.vine_lash.name: Vine Lash
skill.vine_lash.desc: Ranged: demonic vines lash out in a straight line, up to 4 tiles.
skill.wolf_bite.name: Wolf Bite
skill.wolf_bite.desc: Melee: a swift bite from an adjacent target.
skill.minor_heal.name: Lesser Spring Renewal
skill.minor_heal.desc: Restores 2 HP to the nearest ally in a straight line, up to 1 tile.
skill.major_heal.name: Greater Spring Renewal
skill.major_heal.desc: Restores 4 HP to the nearest ally in a straight line, up to 2 tiles.
skill.heavy_shield.name: Bulwark Stance
skill.heavy_shield.desc: Plant a heavy stance, raising a barrier that blocks the next 2 hits.
skill.taunt.name: Provoke
skill.taunt.desc: Jeer at a foe in a straight line, up to 3 tiles, forcing it to target you for 2 turns.
skill.sword_tempest.name: Sword Qi Tempest
skill.sword_tempest.desc: Ultimate: unleash a storm of sword qi, dealing 30% of current HP to every enemy on the field. Once per level run.
skill.sword_rampage.name: Rampaging Blades
skill.sword_rampage.desc: Ultimate: the flying swords spiral out of control, dealing 20% of current HP to EVERY unit on the field — allies and self included. Once per level run.
skill.roaring_shockwave.name: Roaring Shockwave
skill.roaring_shockwave.desc: Ultimate: a thunderous roar knocks every enemy on the field back 2 tiles. Once per level run.
skill.spring_rain.name: Spring Rain
skill.spring_rain.desc: Ultimate: a healing rain restores 3 HP to every ally (not yourself). Once per level run.

map.final_hive.name: The Sealing Array
map.lesson_ap_cost.name: Lesson: Move, Then Act
map.lesson_ap_cost.hint: This level: each hero's turn is move first (one committed move), then ONE action — a skill or a rest. Once you act, you can't reposition, so pick your tile before you swing.
map.lesson_opportunity_attack.name: Lesson: Position Before You Strike
map.lesson_opportunity_attack.hint: This level: acting ends that hero's turn — there is no retreating after the hit lands, so the tile you strike from is the tile you get hit on. Read the red telegraph tiles on the board first (and the ①②③ resolution order) — they update live as you reposition — then move somewhere both in range and off the red tiles before you commit.
map.lesson_push_abyss.name: Lesson: Push into the Abyss
map.lesson_push_abyss.hint: This level: Cloud-Parting Palm can shove a monster straight into a hazard tile for an instant kill — a monster doesn't survive the fall the way a hero would.
map.lesson_healer.name: Lesson: Using a Healer
map.lesson_healer.hint: This level: Bai Zhi's heals are what let Li Yan keep tanking and blocking. Watch the HP bar — healing at the right moment is what wins this one, not just hitting harder.
map.lesson_poison_mist.name: Lesson: Poison Mist Terrain
map.lesson_poison_mist.hint: This level: that green mist chips anyone standing on it at turn's end, monster included. The ghost's route crosses it, so it's already weakened before you land the finishing blow.

ui.instruction_idle: Click a character, then click a highlighted tile to move, or a skill button below.
ui.instruction_armed: Click a highlighted tile to aim, or click the skill again to cancel.
ui.last_wave_reminder: Final turn! You don't need to kill everything — survive this turn with the base alive and you win.
ui.outcome_wipe: Squad wiped out! Restarting from wave 1.
ui.outcome_defeat: The base fell! Restarting from wave 1.
ui.outcome_victory: Held the line! Every wave survived.
